verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Don't be distressed If you encounter a storm Be it a storm of criticism, Financial, relational conflict Sickness, pain and shame you're more than able to surpass these You have all the power And authority dwelling within you The Lord has promised you He will never leave you nor forsake you He has encouraged you through His Word

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It is time to cross over God's been preparing His people To go into the land that He has promised us The enemy will not be able to stand against us 'Cause greater is He who is in us Than he that is in the world. The Greater One lives within us.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Satan doesn't want us to get to the other side And he'll try everything to stop us from getting there Remember the other side Is where we will hit the mark We're just placed here for a purpose But that is a place for us So let's not be discouraged God made a promise And the promise is for us

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: It is time to take back the land that the enemy has stolen from us It is time for the power of our God to be released It is time for us people of God to be filled with the Holy Spirit It is time to live the revelation God has given to us When we are in full possession of everything
